name: SplitText
description: Per-character stagger animation that splits text and animates each letter individually with configurable presets and stagger timing from the token system.

text.description: The text string to split and animate per-character

stagger.description: Stagger delay between characters. Token name or raw ms value.

preset.description: Motion preset for each character's entrance

viewThreshold.description: Fraction of element visible before triggering

slots.name: text
slots.description: The text content split into individually animated characters via the text prop

layout.description: Renders as a block div containing inline-block character spans. Works best with large, short text like headings.

aiPromptHint: Use SplitText for dramatic headline entrances where each character animates individually. Adjust 'stagger' with token names ('tight' 40ms, 'normal' 80ms, 'relaxed' 150ms, 'dramatic' 250ms) or raw ms values. Combine with any preset — 'fadeUp' for rising text, 'scaleIn' for growing letters, 'blur' for focus-in effect. Best for short headlines, not paragraphs.

examples.title: Dramatic entrance with slow stagger
examples.code:
<SplitText
  text="LAUNCH"
  stagger="dramatic"
  preset="slideUp"
  className="text-8xl font-black tracking-widest"
/>

examples.title: Scale-in with tight stagger
examples.code:
<SplitText
  text="Design System"
  stagger="tight"
  preset="scaleIn"
  className="text-5xl font-semibold"
/>

examples.title: Blur reveal with custom ms stagger
Pop-in letters
examples.code:
<SplitText
  text="New Feature"
  preset="popIn"
  stagger="relaxed"
  className="text-4xl font-bold text-orange-400"
/>
